Willem Kalf

2 works in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Still Life with a Silver Jug and a Porcelain Bowl
by Willem Kalf
Dutch Golden Age · c. 1655
A Chinese porcelain bowl, a silver ewer, a half-peeled lemon. Willem Kalf's "pronkstilleven" (showy still life) arranges imperial loot from the global trade on one dark table — opulence as quiet drama.
Wineglass and a Bowl of Fruit
by Willem Kalf
Netherlands · 1663 · oil on canvas
←Kaikei Vasily Kandinsky→
